name: birdlink-app
description: BirdLink information collection and transmitter mobile app

scripts.web:copy: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (!(Test-Path www)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory www | Out-Null }; Copy-Item index.html,styles.css,app.js,manifest.json,service-worker.js,icon.svg -Destination www -Force"
